A

addDiscount(String, String, double) - Method in class kf.ListManager
Adds a new discount item to the discounts list.
addInvoiceItem(String, String, double) - Method in class kf.ListManager
Adds a new invoice item to the invoiceItems list and sorts the list.

addInvoiceRows(List<InvoiceRow>) - Method in class kf.api.Invoice
 
Api - Class in kf.api
The Api class handles authentication and communication with the Fortnox API.
Api() - Constructor for class kf.api.Api
Constructs an Api instance with the defualt configuration file.
Api(File) - Constructor for class kf.api.Api
Constructs an Api instance with a specified configuration file.
App - Class in kf
Main application class for KF Öresund invoice management system.
App() - Constructor for class kf.App
 
articleNbr - Variable in class kf.InvoiceItem
 

C

close() - Method in class kf.api.Api
Closes the local server used for authentication.
close() - Method in class kf.api.LocalServer
Stops the local HTTP server.

E

editDiscount(InvoiceItem, String, String, double) - Method in class kf.ListManager
Edits an existing discount item with new data and updates the discounts list.
editItem(InvoiceItem, String, String, double) - Method in class kf.ListManager
Edits an existing invoice item with new data and updates the lists accordingly.

Returns the extraItems list.
getForAll() - Method in class kf.ListManager
Returns the forAll list.

getInvoiceItems() - Method in class kf.ListManager
Returns the invoiceItems list.
getInvoiceRows() - Method in class kf.api.Invoice
 
getPrice() - Method in class kf.api.InvoiceRow
 

I

Invoice - Class in kf.api
Represents an invoice in the system with customer details and invoice rows.
Invoice() - Constructor for class kf.api.Invoice
 
InvoiceItem - Class in kf
Represents an invoice item with key, article number, price, and availability status.
InvoiceItem(String, String, double) - Constructor for class kf.InvoiceItem
 
InvoiceRow - Class in kf.api
Represents a row in an invoice, containing article details and quantity information.
InvoiceRow() - Constructor for class kf.api.InvoiceRow

key - Variable in class kf.InvoiceItem
 
kf - package kf

L

ListManager - Class in kf
The ListManger class is responsible for managing lists of InvoiceItem objects.

Constructor for the ListManger class.

A local HTTP server implementation for handling OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow.

P

Parser - Class in kf
A CSV file parser specifically designed for processing invoice-related data.

Constructs a Parser object and initiates parsing of the specified file.
price - Variable in class kf.InvoiceItem
 

R

remove(InvoiceItem) - Method in class kf.ListManager
Removes an invoice item from all lists.
removeDiscount(InvoiceItem) - Method in class kf.ListManager
Removes a discount item from the discounts list.
removeInvoice(String) - Method in class kf.api.Api
Removes an invoice from the Fortnox API using the provided invoice number.

S

sendInvoice(Invoice) - Method in class kf.api.Api
Sends an invoice to the Fortnox API using the provided Invoice object.
sendInvoiceList(List<Invoice>) - Method in class kf.api.Api
Sends a list of invoices to the Fortnox API using the provided List of Invoice objects.
sendInvoiceTest(Invoice) - Method in class kf.api.Api
Sends a test invoice to the Fortnox API using the provided Invoice object.

setPrice(double) - Method in class kf.InvoiceItem
 
start(Stage) - Method in class kf.App
Main method to launch the JavaFX application.
startServer() - Method in class kf.api.LocalServer
Initializes and starts a local HTTP server on port 8080.

T

toggleForAll() - Method in class kf.InvoiceItem
 
toggleForAll(InvoiceItem) - Method in class kf.ListManager
Toggles the forAll property of an invoice item and updates the forAll and extraItems lists.
toInvoices(ArrayList<InvoiceItem>, ArrayList<InvoiceItem>, ArrayList<InvoiceItem>) - Method in class kf.Parser
Converts the parsed CSV data into a list of Invoice objects.
